The server Prashant offered me the chicken burger, roasted cod and the butter chicken and the masala tea is awesome which was given by him.i loved to talk him and Anoop the supervisor was the great person he is the one who helped us a lot . Love to visit it again. awesome staff n place.

This restaurant is non traditional and one can get both modern European and fusion food here. We went as a family for lunch and tasted both types.  The ambiance was great and the dining hall was less crowded with very low noise levels The items in the menu were limited but they all looked interesting and exotic. the lobster bisque was rich and creamy and quite tasty. So was the prawns . The food ordered by my other family members was also very good one of them was a vegetarian and found the soup and food very good and enjoyable. The waiters were polite and helpful and although the delay in service was notable.  I recommend this restaurant located inside the Pullman hotel in Aerocity
High quality of service and hospitality for mr. Utkarsh in dinning. Well mannered, highly appreciated for hes excelence service.

Last night I had a dinner with my friend. Excellent service with superb quality. Chef Deepak khariya suggested all the dishes. Starting from the soup then starter, main course and at last rasmalai desert was amazing. Special thanks to Chef Deepak khariya for the suggestion. It is fantastic place to dine in. The place was awesome and decoration was very creative. Definitely visit again and again :)
Rahul’s service is exceptional. Love staying at the Pullman with work. Enjoyable as ever. Bar is great.

The place is well located and is lavishly made.The food looks great and the presentation part is very good flavour wise it's not as per Indian Palate but over all for the experience it's great. The staff is very courteous and always look forward to serve.An over all good place to dine with friends and family

Went with family friends. The ambience is really good. The food too is very well presented. The dishes we ordered were paneer tikka, mushroom soup, and textures of Amarnath. In mains, the mushroom risotto was really good. They have a tablet to show the menu as well as how each dish looks and is prepared. An experience.

We went to dine at Pluck. Amazing ambience with soothing music and the delicious food with excellent service. We ordered for kafi lime paneer, 3mushroom risotto and the malai prawns which was outstanding in taste. And a special thanks to beautiful nisha for her courteous service. "A must Visit".
spend one night in delhi in the hotel and had fantastic dinner at the NYC the lovely waitress Kim gave us some great tips for our trip in India and was super entertainment

We checked in today and had a great evening at the restaurant situated at the lobby of this hotel. It's truly appreciating to have Kim Singlet who came and interacted with us very warmly. It's a great hospitality and making us feel at home away from home.Kim keep your great work going and keep smiling always, thank you.

Excellent buffet for breakfast and dinner. Did not have the opportunity to try the lunch buffet. The vegetarian spread had many varieties. All the staffs were very attentive and always looking to our needs. I would like to highlight Mr.Sudhir for his warm good morning welcome and taking the initiative to look into not only mine, but also the surrounding guests needs. Credit to the chef's, waiters and all staff at the restaurant although I did not get the chance the get the other staff's names. A really pleasant experience. Food wise, Pani Puri for dinner was amazing, chai was very nice too. In general, all food was amazing, tried only all the vegetarian food this time. The black coffee was very strong though, probably from a dark roast. If there were options for filter coffee or medium/light roast, that would be perfect.
Sumit kumar did great service he was very calm and composed. He attended us really very nicely. Thankyou so much for great experience . He served us on table . He did is duty amazingly keep it up
Amazing hospitality by Sumit Kumar  .he was very patiently handling everything. There are very less people who handle guests like this.

It was an awesome experience, the food was so good! that we stayed for 3 hours to eat! and Tejashvi was so attentive and friendly, pretty and very professional. Vinod and Rajneesh was very helpful, definetly, gonna go back again. I love India ❤️

Even a short visit to the bar makes my time really joyful, a nice place to hangout and get some refreshment, specially thanks to Mr. Avinash Kumar for his outstanding service to me and my friend. we are planning to visit there soon.
An open bar in the lobby....excellent food...good range of beverages and cocktails....nice place to chill and unwind at the end of the day!!!
This is totally one of the the best bars to be with your friends while you are in Delhi. The service team headed by Topesh was super accommodating and our evening a blast !! Keep up the good work.
Visited for a quick get together with friends, was not disappointed at all. The selection of food and drinks is world class. Topesh and his team is very friendly. Will be back soon..

A nice place to have breakfast. Was there with 2 other friends food was good and chefs preparation was excellent (eggs Benedict to be precised) and Radhey the Steward was outstanding in his service , was always on his toes for the request . Will surely visit again..
Nice place to chill out or work a bit. Chilled out atmosphere and nice and well trained staff. Ask for Varnit, best waiter ever!
Superb service by Mr Deepak and Mr Avinash perfect person to make special drinks for you . well experienced to take special care

Having arrived on a late flight, I elected for the buffet, easy and quick. Whilst the curry lamb was too tough to cut (I didn't try to chew it), the chicken was OK. Reasonable selection of desserts, but all very ordinary. Maybe it was because it was late and approaching closing time.
Superb besan chillas, sambar and chutneys delivered by Chef Saurabh. Very lavish buffet additionally. Excellent personalized service by Ravi Dwivedi and Navneet Kumar.

We have just spent 2 weeks around Rajasthan trying numerous dishes of the state.. we were surprised and delighted to find your food up with the best of them. The service was excellent, willing and thoughtful.
The hostess was very attentive courteous n friendly. Her name is tejashvi. The food was great the ambience was inviting

Been here for a late evening meeting before our flight, and sorry to say you need to change your chefs urgently. The food is pathetic, and lacks taste and flavour. The service doesn't and wouldn't matter unless the food got some taste. The chicken was raw and breads were dried.food is generally the reason a person comes to restaurant if you cannot match that I am sorry but you won't have guest at all. please look into it as my parents are regular to the hotel.
Good service and food. Tejashui and Aquib were very helpful with the menu and described indian dishes we were not familiar with.
Good food. Friendly staff. Nice Indian food. Service was quick and efficient. Overall a wonderful dining experience.
Dvar is the best Indian restaurant whilst offering splendid service by Bhupender who has got a wonderful smile who creates a spectacular atmosphere and serve with great joy. Totally a worth visit.

Since years I have been trying great restaurants with good food and this has got all the qualities serving Indian food and chef comes and takes your feedback about your overall dinner which is commendable as he understands the taste of the food and requirement the best.
Visited dvar restaurant with my businesses partner for a soothing dinner afterwards Busy schedule and enjoyed a lot in terms of Indian food and quick service
I have never been across to such a wonderful restaurant. Classy elegant and one can actually feel they are dining in a five star restaurant. Simply stunning place

A dinner wonderful spent with my family and friends. A must visit place if you come across to Dwarka. It a very beautiful restaurant which serves fabulous Indian food with beautiful people serving you with heart
Lovely ambience, unique dal makhani, lighting is low and Cozy. Additional live Indian band plays some nice songs which add the vibe to your dinner. Overall enjoyed alott

Our first night in the Radison Blu Hotel in Dwarka has been very pleasant. All the workers have been very attentive and kind worrying a lot to make our stay in this amazing country great.  Especially Simran and Bhupender have been excellent waiters in the Dvar Restaurant of the hotel serving us tasty Indian dishes. We are looking forward to spending here the rest of our days in India.

This was my first time at Dwar ..earlier I’ve visited many times Spring restaurant.. but this time the experience was awesome.. great ambience.. great singer team for live music ... highly recommended..Mr Bhupender Rawat was Very nice and pleasant making the experience great.
Just had a wonderful lunch. Food was amazing as always and prashant’s hospitality and service is beyond words.  Thanks prashant you are an asset to the hotel....

This restaurant also serves as breakfast place for people staying in the hotel. We experienced lunch and breakfast while staying in the hotel. We tried the Tandoori Chicken Cannelloni , Trilogy of Lamb which was lit but spicy with Indian Taste . The food was very tasty and nice.  The breakfast was very nice, with a rich selection of bread, rolls, and with a kitchen that offered dosa and Live counter which makes varieties of eggs.The service offered was fantastic, and I got really good assistance From Anoop .  I'd certainly recommend this place...

Words would be too small if i say exellent, wow or tremendous....!! Becoz during her service she was to gracefull and polite and also in suggesting a particular meal at that time...Miss Nisha is a fantabulous associate ur pluck has got...!!People say u made my day..but i wil surely say u made my evening little girl through ur appearance and charm...thank you for the mesmorising experience this evening...!!love to visit again to witness ur professionalised service....!! (Devi lal)
Exception variety of things to eat, quality as you would expect from a five star. Overall a very good experience.

It was indeed an amazing experience. For d first time we experienced an electronic menu on the tablet and that too every dish had a video and exactly same was served. We ordered soup and veg biryani and it was too delicious. Thanks for d superb hospitality.

I had visited the resturant the previous day for lunch with my family. They serve modern european and contemporary indian cuisines. I had odered for some indian dishes which were awesome in tatste specially the dessert. My lil son really loved the ice tea which was served and the Server NISHA was really sweet with her amazing smile.  Looking ahead for the sunday brunches. Thankyou for the wonderful experience. Keep it up !
The ambience was good. Food was a real taste , sudhir he really hosted warm , especially original malai tikka .the complementary was flavourfull too
It's good be here at radisson . Guide us deciding our fav. Food at DNR time and different tastes enjoyed by us... Nd Mr.Sumit help us alot ...
The food was amazing and staff service was good too. Excellent service and the ambience was good too. Tejashvi and Sumit served us really well.

2nd visit to this place and definately coming back in future for its service , serenity at alfresco and billiards to unwind our stress from our hectic schedule. Thanks to Deepak for taking care of us every time and for his hospitality. Looking forward for more such visits.

Ahh hold on ... lemme remind some names : in fact every one from quoin has made my day to end with great drinks and hospitality . Mr Tarun and his team has delighted with some amazing and lip smacking good to gulton upon . Surely going to visit again with family
Fantastic experience for our dinner. Tasty food and great service. Thanks Aquib and Tejashvi for your great work!
Really amazing food and very nice people. They really take care of your needs. Sumit was very friendly and always made sure we were comfortable. Will def recommend to anyone!!

Incredible hospitality by all staff, reflection of an incredible India. We were treated to royalty by Sudhir and Aquib. Reception was fast and accommodating including allowing early check-in. Great place.
Food top class,  service prompt. I visit this often and trust me never get disappointed. Dvar satisfies my all dining experience with warmth service and tasty food
Came here to celebrate my wife's birthday. Bhupendra was awesome on understanding our needs and made our day special.
Visited yesterday with friends it’s a nice place to hangout post work hours. Wonderful cocktails and cordial staff, will definitely be back soon.

It was a great experience at quion bar. The service of the Lusi was amazing. We are very happy and satisfied with her service and specially bar had a very good music collection and drink as well. I thank you very much Lusi and Novotel hotel. Hats off to staff of quion bar.we will definitely come back. See you soon Novotel.
I spend good time at bar and have some drinks good atmosphere love to visit again.. healthy food.. hygiene level is also great!! Recommended
Lucy was very helpful and kept us happy. The food was great and enjoyed the big screen. The kids also enjoyed a lot
Superb place to be.. good place to sit and relax.. loved the music here.. if u want to chill this is a great place will pool table and indoor golf..  Lucy is super polite and very friendly staff
A evening well spent with live music...Mr bupender rawat was there to assist us..Food is really awesome prepared by experience chef

Pluck is my favorite whenever I am at Aerocity or around. Buffet lunch is not to be missed. No extra variety but everything is rightly chosen and very well appointed and similar is Buffet Breakfast. Service is also great. Have been here a number of times and it has always lived up to expectations.
Beautiful service & delicious food ...Mohit was incredible ..very genuine, Kind & super friendly.. Thank you so much for looking after us you’re a star
Such a lovely place serving you delicious Indian food. Great dining with wonderful staff like Afsar and chef naqvi. I have enjoyed every moment

NYC is dependably a wonderful experience. The atmosphere is enjoyable, food is delicious and service by Aquib, Rajneesh, Sumit and Abigail is superb. They always make me feel welcomed and when I am away from home its a very nice to feel their warmth. Every morning I especially enjoyed the fresh fruit and juices and pure veg Indian breakfast items. On my final night of this week long visit before taking the long overnight flight to USA I thoroughly enjoyed the dinner buffet feast. Dhanyavaad to the Chefs and service staff...see you next time.

The primary restaurant in this hotel has a wide variety to choose from. The more than ample buffet served 3 times daily to the menu featuring continental, Indian and other dishes made to order. The hotel is nice by itself with friendly, knowledgeable staff but the restaurant only adds to the nice stop for the business traveler.  When here for meals, request Tejashvi Ravi for service to rave about.

Some more comfortable seating is required as currently the sofas are not at all comfortable to sit on. Though the services are very good but still there is requirement of good seating, though music is very good out side quoin in the open restaurant outside. Other all services and food was all very good. It's a nice place to start a day with.
THANKS Kum for your efforts in making our evening joyous and comfortable, keep wearing the smile always.
It’s my first time visit to Novotel Quoin bar and I had a wonderful time in bar and really appreciate with the service provided by your staff Kum and Tshering.keep it up for your hard work

Quoin bar at Novotel Aerocity is one of the nice place for hangout. I loved the ambiance and the service provided by the staff . Staff at Quoin Bar is very promising , Kum was really good and dedicated at her work . Keep it up. Will surely visit repeatedly.

Quoin is actually a bar withinin the lovely Novotel in the Aerocity region of Delhi, within the perimiter of Delhi's Indira Gandhi Airport.  The staff were very pleasant, but the service was pitifully slow. 50-minutes for a hand and cheese sandwich was a bit too long, especially as we were leaving for the airport a short time later. There was no explanation.... The sandwich, however, was hot and tasty as were the fries that accompanied it.

Really enjoy our visit and thank you very much lusi for your service and really liked the offer their bar....For sure we will come if we visit in India next time thank you everyone from Quoin bar great staff and great drink choice!!!!
I have been with my family to dvar restaurant had a great time it was wonderful experience service and food was awesome will suggest all my friends to visit with their family at dvar.
this is a good place if you enjoy some quality time with your partner as well as you can enjoy the fantastic food here.
Excellent food with live music beautiful ambience, above all excellent service specially by Bhupender Rawat. Must visit
Nice Ambience, well behaved host bhupender rawat, excellent food with light live music. Must visit dvar. Will come again very soon with friends
Good food and pleasant dining what you expect from a five star restaurant but this restaurant has an extra advantage of music being perfectly matched with indin food.
It was a wonderful experience at DVAR our waiter Bhupender Rawat was very good and affectionate. Must visit place !!!
Lovely service & a fab choice. Ankita convinced to try the dosa and it was delicious. Make sure you go to the gym before having breakfast here!

Quite upset with the hospitality showed by chef in the restaurant. I was waiting to order a pancake but the chef closes the counter sharp at 1030 & when I ask him to make one he rudely said NO to me.  Being to a 5 star property you don't expect this type of hospitality. Rest of the things are fine.
Restaurant "PLUCK " got delicious food . The service of chef KAPIIL KUMAR & attendant UTKARSH are friendly & excellent service ! What a wonderful experience!
Mohit is a great waiter and talked us through the delicious menu! We decided on the butter chicken which was great! Thank you for a fantastic night at your hotel, we love it and can’t wait to return!

We were there for dinner few days ago. It was too superb everything went well Hostess vahsy welcomed us with a friendly smile as she gave us the table which had a very beautiful view of the hotel courtyard host Kamal suggested us to go for chicken donuts with cream and cheesy sauce & Lamb loin with jus which was good suggestion. Will definitely visit again. Thank you for the excellent hospitality*****

Amazing food and ambience. Had the best time with my friends at pluck. They have the lavish menu with limited choices..On recommendation of miss nisha we odered for chicken morsels for starter and the butter chicken for mains which were awesome in taste.. Amazing hospitality by Nisha with that sweet comforting nature. Thank you for a fantastic evening at your hotel, we love it and can’t wait to return! Kudos to team pluck !

Had went to the restaurant with my family few days back. Odered lamb loin, pork belly n tortelini which were amazingly delicious. Superb ambience, great atmosphere. Special mention to our server nisha for her attention and the extra ordinary service. Awesome experince. Thumbsup
Very friendly efficient and good fun. Would definitely recommend. Very nice service by Mohid who was very sociable friendly. Food was gorgeous

Had a night at the Pullman and breakfast at Pluck- a wide variety of food, tasty and in a great room with great daylight but the most impressive aspect was the service. Very attentive servers and one in particular, Rohit Gupta (whose card I asked for) who went above and beyond.

A business dinner in what was an almost empty restaurant.Not withstanding the lack of atmosphere, meals were good, though choice of wines were limited and pricey. Is better than most restaurants in the area but lacks warmth.

Dvar is beautifully located in Radisson hotel.  I stay nearby but tried this restaurant for the first time and I am really very impressed with their impressive food service and music. Thanks dvar team
Very elegant place with smiling people serving you from their heart. Overall a splendid dinner spent with my family and close relatives. Music was too good and keep you engaged

Our first week in Delhi and we have been to quite a few restaurants but the food at this restaurant, coupled with the great service from our waiter Bhupender, was outstanding! we even got to meet chef Naqvi, who specialises in lamb dishes. We couldn't recommend the lamb on the menu enough!
A great place for awesome indian food. great ambience and superb live music. I enjoy every time I visit this place. strongly recommended for family or a group of friends.

A very tasty Indian food at Dvar restaurant and melodiously played Indian songs being honoured by a very sweet little band adds the whole mood of positive vibes and one swings into a new world of food music and entertainment
A really good food and service a amazing staff Mr afsar kaushal Mr aniket for wonderful dinner and  their service with friendly nature. Would be definitely recommend for my friends....

Today had a great food experience at the NYC at Radisson Blu Plaza Delhi. We were made to feel special by the host Kim Singsit at NYC. We really appreciate her courteous service. And the quality of food was great which really satisfied our taste buds.  Thanks to NYC for their professionalism.

My daughter and me were tired of Indian food so we ordered a burger. It was delicious and the waiter, Mr Kalum, was so friendly and served us soup from the buffet before and a small chocolate dessert after. Thank you very much for this very much!

Kim Singsit was the only server who made sure I tried the authentic Indian cuisine. She was watching me like a hawk making sure I was taking care of, then all of a sudden she said... SIR why don't you try some real Indian food. I said sure, and she promptly made sure I tried the real Indian breakfast. I'm very thankful for Kim and the hotel should be grateful for her as well. Thank you Kim

We had lunch here some time back! They have some or the other food festivals going on. Live sushi station is also there. The asian food was spectacular. We really loved the desserts too. They do special requests too if you need something made according to your taste the chef will be happy to oblidge.

I stayed at the Radisson Blu 2 separate nights on my recent business trip to India! The hotel is super close to the airport (15 minutes by taxi) which was most important! The rest took me by surprise! The welcome (as I walked in for the second one night stay, the man at the door said welcome back!!! How the heck did he remember?!!!) My check in was easy and the staff super friendly - I was actually upgraded to a business class room the second night!!!  I had 2 really good experiences at the restaurant! I opted for a la carte and on both occasions my waiters went the extra mile suggesting local cuisine for me! Both got the meals spot on!!!! Sadly I didn’t get the lunch waiter’s name but Aquib in the evening was outstanding! This kind of stuff is even more important when you’re traveling on your own! Thank you Awuib and thank you Radisson!

Got great advice on the good menu and various beers. Both servers kept on eye on me as I’m not a big spicy food eater. I was given consistent attention throughout my dining. Both servers were very friendly and warm and answered questions I had about India too. A very positive experience altogether.  Thank you Ravi Dvinedi and Tejashvi

I frequent Radisson Blu Plaza whenever I visit Delhi and especially enjoy the Spa and the International breakfast buffet at NYC. The staff are so welcoming and if you are lucky you will get a waiter like Aquib or his supervisor Sudhir to take such good care of you while you are there. The fresh juices and fruit buffet and Indian breakfast are the best! NYC restaurant has an even more amazing dinner buffet, but its a bit pricey. Enjoy!
Excellent Breakfast buffet and make to order , staff always a step ahead to serve as per menu request
Thank you for nice service, especially Ms.Tejashvi. She is very gentile and has a good hospitality. I ate Butter checken curry. Very good!!!! Try it!
This hotel is always been our first choice. They have simply super service and awesome food. It is always the best.
100 % best service Rajneesh is best person and this is best service at minimum rate I love this hotel.

excellent!! Very tasty and nice cocktails. The staff always quick to provide you the service and food! Attention to the guest, nice pool table and nice atmosphere. Nice talking to bar staff and nice for them to see that they take of you at anytime and I’m here from November to end of April.. Staff make it special!
The stuff here is amazing! Very helpful and always smilling! They are turning around the bar as like bees
The bar is nice, they have a few table games like pool and foosball, but the best part is friendy staff. Many thanks to Pankaj.
After spending 2 months here i really like the service which i get from deepak sahoo and avinash kumar. Both are very positive towards there work. Thanks to both of them I had really pleasant stay.
I know that hotel bars are there to earn money, but there is a limit to what one should earn on a single drink... This bar -- in my humble opinion -- is above this limit...
Nice foods, great service!  The atmosphere is good too！  Special thanks to Pulamte, Avinash, Sahoo,Lusi, Tshring, Pankaj Their service is awesome!
Extraordinary food with extraordinary service and amazing ambience.. A must visit for all the food lovers. Keep it up guys. Full five stars !!!!!
Chef Naqvi made a delightful and garnished kichdi and Bhupendra Rawat suggested a good starter drink . Enjoyable evening spent with music ( missed Livemusic as it was Monday)

Food was awsome..... Didn't expected such a warm welcome and a great services.  Kudos # to team dvar lovely people lovely hospitality. Such a trained person, would recommend everyone to visit the place too.  Special efforts would love to mention them.  Aniket chowdhary Anup "" Superb guy.  Naveen  Chef nakvi Simran the winky girl.  Thanks and love you all .. For great services.
I would like to say that Mr. Mohit was gave me a very good service, he was find me a lovely seat when the restaurant was totally full, and gave me very good service.
Best curry and great service with mohit and utkatsh!!! Made it such a great experience Thank you!!!!
The presentation of the foods were excellent and tasty plus the staffs are very accomodating and friendly most especially Mohit will definitely visit again., God bless and more power

I had a great time at this nice, clean hotel, with great staff, always smiling and asking as to how my stay was going. My room was cleaned everyday, and was given extra attention by all staff, especially Nisha of the services team. I’ll definitely stay at hotel Pullman whenever am in New Delhi, India!

This is the fourth time I have been visiting. They always treat you like family and taking care of all your needs. They’re not just the servers, but your friends. Sometimes you don’t even have to speak, they know your needs and serve right away. Even you only came for one or two times, they always remember you.  Special thanks to Kamal, Utkarsh, Nisha, and another who is one his personal leaves. I am so glad that you guys are always here waiting for our visits.

Good place with amazing hospitality. Food was good. One can visit surely for an experience and taste of their delicacy dish butter chicken. The best part of this restaurant is the ipad menu which shows the preparation of the each dishes. Loved this concept.
Wonderful service for all customers! Mr. Sagar is the best server! Recommand you to come here and give it a try!!!!!!!!!

Ate here on an overnight stay at the Pullman. Despite the cafeteria feel of the restaurant the food is delicious and the service is excellent. We shared two starters....could have just had one as the portion sizes are generous. The olive chicken baked in The tandoori was beautiful chicken and very delicately flavoured. We shared a butter chicken main course with grilled vegetables. Gorgeous!! Service was excellent...particularly Kamal. He was very professional and helpful. Loved it!
I have been visiting this restaurant which is beautifully designed and located in radisson DWARKA. Food service ambience music all are the top class
Delicious! Nice enviroment, and the musiqie nice. Congratulation to Bhupender Rawat , he is a very good hoster!
I went there with my family. It's amazing ambiance. Loved Indian food. Lovely Indian music. Surely will visit again.
We had very delicous vegaterian meals and the service was magnificant. We will definetly come back the next time
The great service provided by tejashvi and kim in nyc at the time of breakfast .we enjoyed a lot .Specially the masala tea was amazing. Wants to again that place.

I would recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Delhi. The staff are always smiling and attentive, the service is first class. Thank you to Aquib and Sudhir for making our dining experience so amazing!
Overall is good ,ms Tejashvi services was tip-top.Yet the choice is not that much hopefully there’s will be improvements on next visit.
The service was very good and Rajneesh Singh was our host. He was very polite and cooperative. Was greqt to have him there and hoping to visit the place again as it has good ambience and food.
Rajneesh is a best person he is very polite and calm i love the way he treat us.best place ambience is superb i love to visit again and again.

Hotel exceeded expectations. Lobby was clean and inviting; room was cleaned, food was delicious, staff was friendly, shuttle service was great, and spa was sensational. Special thanks to Sudnir and Rishabh for making our stay very special! I highly recommend this hotel. I read some negative reviews but I reassure you that this hotel will more than likely exceed your expectations, as well. I’m from NYC and it definitely pass the litmus test!

Had a lovely evening here owing to great food suggestions and courteous staff Luci who went the extra mile to serve us and make sure we were comfortable. Great food and drinks menu, and delightful ambience makes it one of the best places in Aerocity. Would definitely visit again! Cheers!
Great place to chill after a long flight, good selections of whiskey, wines and cocktails, great service and friendly bartender Deepak was awesome. Feel safe as the security here is very very tight!

I visited quoin to watch the AO with my friend and the experience was fantastic... starting from the pulante(I hope am spelling his name right), he was extremely warm and caring...he gave us the best seats and for a moment it felt like we were the only guests there then came in Lusi who treated us extremely well. I hope they continue with their exceptional service so that we visit them more often...loved it!

We went in NYC for dinner buffet with family ....we first time came in this restaurant and it was fabulous... Great hospitality by all staff specially Ajay ,Radha and many more ... You guys are rocking... Keep it up  Definitely we will visit again
Exeptionally refined and tasty dinner. Outstanding service: I will mention some members of the personnel, like Sumit , Puneet and Ashok
The food and serve at the Raddisonn Blu Hotel in New Delhi is excellent. The waiters and managers were amazing.
Amazing Food ! Nice Hospitality. Humble staff . Everything was well organised. Specifically staff @ Nyc was great .
Excellent service and very delighted! Sumit understood our requirements and took great care of us. Will visit again soon!
Very nice ambience and food.We loved the kebab and Biryani.Staff is very courteous and polite.Specially thanks to navneet and ajay for great hospitality.thank u will visit very soon.
I visited the NYC on my son's birthday. Delicious food and excellent service. Sumit and Ashok took good care of us with very prompt. Will visit again...for the Sunday brunch. Good job keep it up

The food was great and the staffs were friendly..Enjoyed the overall ambience of the outlet..It was little busy the day I visited the outlet but the managment was so good that I was taken care by the staffs very well.
I went for dinner. Enjoyed every moment of it. Food and service was excellent. Highly recommended restaurant in Delhi. Manager Aniket and his team will make sure you have a fantastic experience
Very nice and professional lady. She made me having a great time at the Quoin bar in New Delhi. I surely come back to visit.

a place so called quoin, m getting habitual or in common language ,regular you can say.  A place which has a nice staff . For getting relaxed you need a place and as well a nice staff who makes it relaxed, and the one who represents this whole staff of quoin is Mr. Gaurav the guy who never forget to take care of guest and fulfill the standard of hospitality  Thanks man  Keep spreading the standard of your service among whom you work  Thanks slot

very amazing resturant dvar food was nice service was very food shivam kaushik was taking care our table and he was good sujjestion in food music aslo feel good thank to dvar staff i will come again definatly
Food and service was good especially Rohit. I want to visit one more time Thank you very much! Every server was really kind and so nice to me.
I am very very happy with Binay service ,he showed courtesy and came with the bill on my room as there was some issue with the billing machine ,very helpful staff
Wide range of breakfast buffet is tooo..good. Can’t have full. Live counter serve excellent south India dishes, one shouldn’t miss. Fully enjoyed
Had a a great experience. Thanks Radha & Ashok for best service and suggestions.…:) Ambience of outlet is really good.
We had lunch in NYC its such a great experience with this restaurant . Great food great ambiance great service. Thankyou Sumit and Ashok for taking care of us .
No matter if i have breakfast there or Dinner the joice is always perfect the personal is friendly and the food superb.thank you NYC for making my stay so wonderful.

After a 2 week tour of Rajasthan, my 2 friends and I decided we'd say farewell to India by eating at Dvar. As we walked in, we were ushered to a table and told to order the special. Looking at the special, we thought it looked like a lot of food and the rule was "no sharing". Then our waiter, Shivam Kaushik came and advised us not to get the special as it was way too much food. Good call!! Thank you for that. I was on the tail end of acute pharyngitis and had a tiny appetite, so that would have been a big waste of food and money for us. He was informative and helpful and so polite.  We also met the chef, Lukesh Bajaj who was also delightful in sharing a few of his kitchen secrets and the manager also came out to chat with us....a very personable man who is well traveled and a delight to talk to. I can't compliment these men enough. A job well done by all 3. Thank you for making our last meal so memorable.

Come to know about the Coffee shop of Radisson blu plaza Delhi Airport That's really nice to visit Good food good staff Specially Aquib was great steward over there the much polite he is I mean speechless Want to be served by him again. Thank you for making it memorable

Hello everyone,while staying at Radisson Blue Dwarka as an International travelor it's always difficult to find a good place with great food which at the same time would be Hygenic, authentic and Genuine. I came to this place and all my concerns regarding quality, hygiene and authenticity was well ADDRESSED along with my taste preferences. The staff named Bhupender and the great chef, Mr Naqvi served AWESOME FOOD probably one of the best while on my journey in India. This place also has GREAT LIVE MUSIC and the singers honored my personal requests too. The entire experience indeed made me feel VERY VERY SPECIAL. If you travel to this place then definately staying at Radisson Blue and enjoing this experience is a must. At last a BIG THANKS goes to the wonderful Radisson Blue Receptionist who escorted me to the restaurant

The navratri thali we ate at Dvar was sumptuous with extravagant dishes.The fruit chat with a tingy taste of mint was awesome.They served sabudaana tikki,paneer tikka,sabudaana papadum as starters.This was followed by palatable colocasia vegetable, kaddu ka saag,butter paneer,kuttu khichdi,samak rice,kuttu ki poori, curd and delicious buttermilk.The desserts included gourd halwa,samak kheer.The gourd halwa was a bit too sugary for me but the kheer was perfect.The servings were large portions and the presentation of food outstanding. The staff was very courteous, prompt and fast in serving.Our server Mr Bhupinder Rawat was very polite and friendly specially with children. Overall we were very satisfied with our dining experience at Dvar on the first auspicious day of Navratri.A very fulfilling outing for us!

Food was authentic and delicious. North Indian food is served here. Live Indian music was there. We were served and attended very nicely. Special mention to Bhupendra Rawat who served us very nicely. Cheers 👍
Went here with family for dinner. Their mutton is a must try! Me rawat’a hospitality is excellent. I recommend this place for everyone

Amazed by Dvar Indian restaurant which serves some best Indian food under a planet located at Radisson Dwarka. We stay nearby and this has become our favourite dining destination as the food people and all the sources recognise us amazingly well.

It’s not just the food which is commendable but also the service here is flawless. The staff is so friendly and good. If you’re thinking of coming here.. I must you shouldn’t even give a second thought about it- The service and the food is anyway going to be superb. Special thanks to Aniket Choudhary, Bhupender Rawat and the team for making the experience at this place so wonderful.
Celebrated my birthday at dvar with my mom dad and sister and the dinner was perfectly planned with nice food awesome service and rasmalai cake surprise was too good.

Also the live ghazal music is something that has become rare in delhi ncr. A must try... And ask for Bhupinder Rawat to attend your table.. You won't be disappointed..
Thank you Guddu and Surpreet for a lovely hospitality. It’s nice to wake up for a delicious breakfast added with some warmth from the staff!

We enjoyed the NYC breakfast buffet and dinner menu during our stay at Radisson Blu. The breakfast buffet is excellent with tons of choices and a live bar that will make fresh eggs, pancakes, waffles, etc. We returned for dinner a couple days later and decided to order from the menu instead of the buffet and were not disappointed with a variety of choices and tasty dishes.

I visited quoin..rudra was one of the preetiest girl ..she gave us very good service she was very professional with her work ..we will come again for sure thank you so much debjani to make our day memorable n special ..

A group of us had Sunday Brunch at Pluck and had a very nice time. The restaurant was not crowded which was very nice. Music in Pluck was nice and relaxing. The food options were many with plenty of veg and non veg choices. Service provided by Rohit and Kamal was exceptional. They were extremely friendly and very attentive to our group throughout the meal.

It was my first visit with my family to NYC Radisson. As we are three members in my family me my wife and my daughter and every one have there own taste. That’s why I always prefer to visit multi cuisine restaurant. So we ordered accordingly for me and my daughter I ordered Asian food and for my wife indian. Usually if you order different categories then it will take time but in NYC OUR food came on time hot and delicious and staff is also very friendly and helpful after serving every dish they ask about food like do you like it or not and if not that what they need to change in recipes so they can serve as per your expectations. At the end I just want to say to NYC staff well done good job you guys are pillars of NYC Radisson. My best wishes are with you guys keep it up. Special Thanks to Mr Sarthak for your Hospitality and kindness.

Beatiful ambiance and reasonable price list. Good time to visit between 1 to 4 in the morning since they have happy hours during that time. Friendly staff, the only thing is there should be a lite music in the night time so it doesnt feel so quit. Although the place was amazing.
Thanks dvar team for lovely hospitality. Totally exceptional experience with watering food. Enjoyed each and moment. Celebrated the evening wonderfully well.

Romantic cosy place full of staff members give you service with smiles and warmth. It a indian restaurant which serves fantastic indian food like Nalli gosth dal makhani and stuffed kulchas. The live indian band sang some mind blowing tracks which were very soothing. One of the best restaurant with fine dining quality and fabulous decor.

I visited dvar recently with my family. Food was excellent and service was quick. All the needs were met on time. Whoever wants to celebrate any special occasions trust me noone will get this appointed.. not to forget their best feature is Indian music band.

Great food. Very helpful staff. Bupinder Rawat was extremely helpful.  Restaurant set menu is great and I would recommend it. Evenings live Gazal music is very good and to a good standard.  All in all, a great dining experience. Definitely I would recommend it to everyone.

Food here is totally authentic and pure Indian. The mutton nalli and galauti kebab are out of this world. Mr.bhupendra and Mr.khan they served us really well and gave us good choices of food. An outstanding experience

Great dvar restaurant serving awesome food and service is very esthethical and prompt. I felt their food is tasty as well as a homely touch. Overall a pleasant experience and not to forget their Indian music was awesome. Thanks Aniket and dvar team.

Food is delectable and they have a fairly good spread to choose from considering you want to nibble on rather gorge on food after drinking. They have some nice sports equipment to enjoy an evening, starting with pool, fuss ball, xbox and an indoor virtual golf course. Raj, one of the managers along with his team viz. Debjani, Lucy, Deepak, Avinash, Sailesh will take care of anyone going there. Lucy is always around and is quite good at anticipating your needs. Chef Abhishek also needs to be mentioned here as many a times he has treated us with dishes which were out of the menu and the world. This is a must visit place if ever you are around Aerocity

Visited NYC restaurant For the Dinner. Found many choices in the Buffet and They serve the ala carte as well. Aquib was Outstanding throughout the time His Service made my Dinner Memorable He is such a polite guy ever I met.  Do well Thank you Aquib Parwez .!! Great Food Great Hospitality

the food was pretty expensive and the pricing was inconsistant we choose the buffet option but each time the bill came it was always a different price why is it not a standard flat rate for the buffet

was a pleasure visiting radisson again as always a very friendly, attentive, courtious, polite and smilling staff  all of them right from the parking to the food to the gaurds the security very pleasant smilling neat fresh staff

The menu is presented on a tablet. It’s impossible to see what is available without a lot of work. It’s a fundamentally bad idea.  Food presentation is lovely. Portions (mains) are tasty but quite small. The one side dish we ordered was twice the size of its photo, though we were told it was small. The staff is attentive and well meaning. But their English language skills fall short. I am well accustomed to language barriers and accents, but I gave up trying to learn what spread accompanied the bread basket. That also prevented us from inquiring about specific dishes. The menu offered titles with pictures, but it was still difficult to determine the nature of a dish, though I’ve visited India before and until now I thought I was familiar with the cuisine. Maybe it was just the electronic menu that started us off on a bad footing. It’s enough to make me say I won’t return here.
Impressive Indian food. The service is nice and efficient especially thankful for Supreet’s good service of wonderful tea.
Hello I want to say that it was great visit to the hotel and restaurant and the service was excellent by (Guddu)
Wide choice of dishes, great quality, excellent service, good atmosphere, Thanks Guddu for the hospitality.
Just arrived from Bangkok: very kindly attended, fast and efficient service, good food and ....nice music ! Thanks a lot !

My friend just landed in the morning and we found out that only quoin will be open in the morning for the drinks. So we went there. Ambiance was good, staff was nice. Only one suggestion that the wasabi peanut given as a compliment was very pungent if that could be changed. Overall a very good experience. Will come again with the family this time.

Comparing the experiences of visiting once every month, I can see the quality is really improving and the servers, chefs, and the team are all professional and experienced.  In February, the breakfast has new choices such as Crepes, Sautés vegetables, and handmade original and organic Marsala Tea.  The sautés vegetable must be the favorite one of Asian. You may pick the sauce from chili, garlic, and another( I’m sorry I forgot what is it) and ingredients of color pepper, greens, and mushrooms. The Marsala Tea must be my favorite. I like to cook and it is fantastic to see how a traditional tea is brewed before you have it. Supreet is today’s tea master. She is very friendly and optimistic, she is the one who brings you a perfect morning. Besides, she owned the professional experience and the skills of making the tea. She even taught me all the details of how to brew it. I have a wonderful morning here with you guys. And, last but not least, the tea is full of the original aroma of the tea leaves. The light ginger smell and taste super match the masala tea. What’s more important is that the amount of sugar level is perfectly mix and bring everything to a balance.  Thank you for you people working hard here and can’t wait to see you next time.  Freda
Excellent Service! Delicious food! 5 Star! Amazing Indian food. Delicious “Butter Chicken” . Really impressed by the unique guest hospitality! Thank you so much!
Bright, friendly restaurant at the Pullman hotel Incredible gastronomy menu. Very well done! The Parmesan burnt garlic soup was amazing Fantastic service, our waitress, Pushpa, was fabulous!!

Level 2 at Radisson Blu serves out a crackling Sunday Brunch. Although not a very extravagant one, the Brunch here manages to satisfy all your taste buds. Divided into salads, starters, mains and desserts, this Brunch covers all the major cuisines keeping everyone interested. Priced at INR 1999+taxes for an alcoholic brunch and INR 1549+taxes for an non alcoholic one, the food tillitates you at times whereas tends to hold its own at other times. We start off with a lovely Aam Panna. Taking a spin off from the original one, this one has Alphonso for the aroma, the green mangoes for concoction and a slice of dashheri to infuse some sweetness. The simple garden salad has been given a new look with the wrapped green salad. Some cold cuts dominate one section ample enough for a meat lover. But it's the cheese on the cucumber that takes your breath away. Three cheeses combined in a loving mixture over a fresh slice of cucumber. There's also some chaat at the counter for those who like their meal spicy. In the entrées, the things which stand out are the soft decadent Dahi ke kebab along with the chicken tikka marinated in raw mangoes. There is also a crisp golden fried fish with a sweet chilli sauce. The Khao Suey leaves some distinctive tastes on your palate while the Indian is not far behind. The Kachori with the aloo ki sabzi is spot on, drawing comparisons from the bylanes of old Delhi. The Firdauzi chicken gives off royal tastes while the stuffed chicken breast will impress even the most staunch European palate. End your meal with some superlative desserts and some in house roasted coffee. A superb coffee machine which produces a beautiful blend of Arabica coffee lies in house serving out delectable coffee to everyone around. The selection is the desserts include the beetroot halwa, death by chocolate, kiwi cupcakes and some Indian mithai to go. So, hop over onto Level 2, Radisson Blu, Paschim Vihar for a delectable and satiating Brunch.

service and the food. I will come again. I like the hotel and location.have a nice trio and thanks all
Elegant Bar in a beautiful hotel. The service was excellent without being OTT and intrusive. The happy hour package is fantastic value. Great staff and I'll be back!
This is a great place to stay when traveling to Delhi. Nice rooms, good restaurants and super friendly staff.
Nothing special but Gin and Tonic was fine. It was just a hotel Bar.. Not a lot to say about it. Would not stay here if traffic and flight times had allowed
Verry very very nice experience to be in savannah bar.This is the first visit for me in radisson with my wife.. Had a awsom time in the savanah.thanks a lot to Ms.Rudra Rani Bhattacharya.

Didn't find the vibe or good value other reviewers mention. It's a tasteful hotel bar with annoying Xmas music and football on the TV. After asking us for our room number (we weren't staying there), staff brought food that we didn't order, explained they didn't have ingredients for the first two cocktails we wanted, and put lemon instead of lime in my G&T, served with a can. None of this would matter if it was a relaxed, friendly place but the Savannah is trying to be much more upmarket, as reflected in the prices.

We had a brief overnight stay at the Radisson Blue before our early morning flight. We took advantage of the happy hour in the Savannah Bar and it was truly a great time! The drinks were very good as was the food. Best of all was the amazing service we received from Vitoni! She was always making sure we had what we needed and everything was to our satisfaction. What wonderful customer service. We will be back! Thank you

You know its going to be a good meal when you head out to a cafe and it is filled with the aroma of freshly made food. Our experience at Fatjar was something similar, located in Kailash Colony, this well lit cafe is a must stop by when those italian meal cravings kick in. They have a daily changing menu and chef makes sure that the best dishes are showcased everyday. My meal here started on a healthy note with watermelon smoothie. It was fresh and all that a good drink should be. Next we tried their pesto pasta which was the perfect mix of basil, garlic, oil and pasta. One of the best in town, this pesto Pasta scored all marks for being good. We tried the Vegetarian Pizza which was made from the scratch. It was beautiful and taste very well. My friend tried the cold coffee and went gaga over it. It was one of the best as per her and definitely worth trying. After a wholesome meal, we were really looking forward to the dessert. We tried the Date Pudding which was the perfect dessert and was one of its kind. Not too sweet and with the right flavors of Banana and dates. Would really recommend this place! If you are looking for a place with authentic food, head here. Take my word, you wont be disappointed
Great experience and very hospitable staff specially akul Taneja was very helpful in meeting our demands at savannah and Opps. Keep it up
Vitoni was super nice and helpful with our drinks and snacks on happy hour. Super nice place and excellent service. Drinks were pretty good and well served.
Nice place to have party with frnds. Good option of drink and food in a reasonable price, enjoyed alot. Appreciate for grt hospitality! Tnx
Really enjoying our stop over in Delhi with friends and family. Lovely Happy Hour with good drinks and snacks and very friendly and helpful staff

‘’Fat jar’’ such a beautiful place, went for a morning breakfast.  Nice Ambience with quite good lighting and the staff is so good and helpful  Coming to the Food we had :  1. Tomato Mozarella Pesto: Served on multigrain bread with tomato & So yummy Mozarella chesse.  2. Humus : Humus served with pita bread pickles . I have tried humus and pita almost everywhere but at this place, its was soo good and delicious. Having this with hot rich and creamy coffee just made my day

The food was exceptional a ‘ must try’ if you are in New Delhi. The menu offers an amazing array of Turkish and Mediterranean food. The atmosphere in the restaurant was cool and very comfortable. A charming cafe that offers food cooked with the freshest ingredients. I relished my order of falafels and truffle eggs on rye toast. Their pizzas looked very inviting. The cafe has fridges full of fresh produce, sauces and cheese on sale. A delightfully satisfying visit.

Wow, such a refreshing surprise. Just a nice place with no pretentiousness. I had the margarita and it was perfect, tasty and at ₹400 it is an absolute steal. The owner is down to earth and know his ingredients. The the staff is friendly and attentive. I will be a regular there from now on.

The food here is nothing short of excellent if you're used to Italian or Mediterranean food back home. Succulent chunks of chicken, tangy sauces, authentic herbs and comforting heavy cream are all within the same dish as I savored my childhood favorite fettucine alfredo. The owner is a gentleman who has traveled far and wide to South East Asia and knows all about the culture and history of the region, and also eager to provide impeccable service and outstanding conversation while you dine. This establishment is located in a shophouse just off the main road so don't go by too fast or you won't see the gate with the FatJar sign. Although on the pricier side compared to other restaurants in the area, you won't find better pasta and ice cream anywhere else in the area!

Had a wonderful time in the savannah bar. Emmanuel was an excellent waiter and extremely helpful and knowledgeable on the wines and extremely attentive. The atmosphere was excellent and good choice of beers
Wonderful time with friends at the Bar with beautiful drinks n finger foods, the service was outstanding for Mr Ravi And Moses. Will visit soon again..
We had a wonderful time here. Great service by Emmanuel. Mezze platter was yum. Thank u so much. Great service. Lovely ambience.
Quiet location st the side of the hotel with a nice deck by the pool. Service from beginning to end was outstanding

I totally recommend it here, will for sure be back when travelling through Delhi.

Great service, with great accomadation!  Rohit was the best bartented in delhi! Radission blu plaza new delhi is the best place to relax and have a good time while being served like a king!

hotel looks good but isn't doing too well, and we understood why..when we went for dinner last week. we went to Level 2 the 24x7 multi cuisines restaurant for dinner. the place looks nice but the service was very poor. staff was deaf towards our orders. we ordered snacks and had to call staff again and again and remind them for the same.pasta & pizza's we ordered came after way too long a wait and was'nt good. buffet for salad and the main course was very badly selected. main course buffet selection had no Dal Makhani!! in a punjabi prominent area you cant go without dal makahni. and we ordered one, we got dal makhani but it was pathetic.

USD 65.00 for 2 G&Ts!! that is more expensive than any bar in NY even.... We were meeting family for dinner, but were a little early, so decided to get a drink at the bar. I asked for Tanquery gin, must have repeated it 3-4 times, cause the bartender kept saying something I couldn't understand..so I kept repeating myself. I would not recommend it to anybody.

We had a family event of brother's anniversary on Nov 28th for which we chose Dwar, Radisson Blue Dwarka for guest count of 15 people. Below is summary of our experience: Pros: - Simple ambience, convenient and well placed for a family - Live Ghazal/ Song by Artistes - Ms. Sonali (alas,name not well remembered) was a pleasant exception. Right from validating our reservation, helping us settle down at our reserved table,attending to all guests and requests- she shone as a bright light in an otherwise dim service experience Cons- - Restaurant had a high guest count on that date and since it takes prior reservations, implies management was aware of expected guest nos. - Poor Server-Guest ratio - - Service was very slow as one 1 Server assigned to a table of 15 guests. Poor Sonali tried her best but eventually, food had turned cold by the time she made a 3-4th round for main course. - For everything, server had to rush to kitchen and back to our table, thereby extending the wait to about 15-20 minutes for item or repeats. (starters, appetizers, soups, main course ,desserts - Billing: It took them 2 iterations and about 25 minutes post dinner to present correct bill. I requested for a meeting with Restaurant manager, who could offer only scripted assurance as one could feel his indifference to our feedback. Not sure if we will ever visit Dwar again for dine-in or family event.
